flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Knox County Career Center fell 12% between 2006 and 2009 (90.0% → 78.8%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Knox County Career Center fell 11% between 2006 and 2009 (92.5% → 82.1%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Knox County Career Center fell 10% between 2021 and 2024 (140 → 126).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Knox County Career Center fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.2% → 0.0%).
